steps.title: Load Sample Data
steps.description: The system loads a dataset of 500 synthetic transactions representing typical banking activity with embedded money laundering patterns.

steps.title: Run Pattern Analysis
steps.description: Click 'Analyze' to execute the pattern detection engine. The agent will scan all transactions for the 10+ known laundering patterns.

steps.title: Review Generated Alerts
steps.description: The system displays detected alerts with severity levels. Each alert is tagged with the specific pattern detected (e.g., Round-Tripping, Funnel Account).

steps.title: Investigate Alert Details
steps.description: Click on an alert to see involved accounts, transaction IDs, pattern indicators, and risk score breakdown.

steps.title: View Network Graph
steps.description: Explore the interactive graph visualization showing entity relationships and transaction flows between accounts.

steps.title: Resolve Alert
steps.description: Mark the alert as resolved with investigation notes. This demonstrates the case management workflow.
